name: Amazon 模特场景卖点并行工厂
description: 参考图输入 + 卖点拆解 + 并行多路图生图（模特图/场景图/卖点文案图），输出可直接投放素材。

data.label: 模特图目标
data.description: 输入本轮场景图目标和卖点方向

data.label: 参考图上传
data.description: 上传产品原图，作为图生图基准

data.label: English Copy Brief
data.description: Example: comfort / portability / power, English-only copy, model required

data.label: 卖点画面规划
data.description: 提炼卖点并生成5路图生图提示词
data.instructions:
Return 5 image-edit prompt routes in ENGLISH ONLY:
A) hero model visual
B) lifestyle scene visual
C) vertical mobile visual
D) square social visual
E) luxury flat-lay selling-point copy visual.
Hard constraints for every route:
1. Keep product identity intact (shape/material/logo details stay consistent with reference)
2. Route A-D require real human model; Route E is product-only flat lay with elegant props
3. One headline (<=6 words) + two badges (<=4 words each), all in English
4. Text safe zones: headline at top margin (5-15% from top), badges at top-left/top-right corners
5. Keep center safe area (35-75% width, 20-85% height) free from text, never cover face/body/product main area.
For Route E, include tasteful callout lines and premium e-commerce layout. You may reference luxury style patterns but DO NOT copy any sample wording verbatim.
Output format per route: route name, final prompt, headline, badge1, badge2, layout notes.

data.label: 并行出图
data.description: 并行生成多风格模特卖点图

data.label: 模特主视觉图
data.description: 电商主视觉：模特+主文案+卖点角标
data.inputMapping: {{agent-plan-model-scene-copy.output.text}}\n\nRoute A: Generate a hero ecommerce visual. Real model uses/holds product. English headline + 2 English badges only. Place text in top margin/corners. Do NOT cover face, torso, or product body.
data.instructions: English-only copy. Layout safety is mandatory. Model and product must stay unobstructed.

data.label: 生活场景卖点图
data.description: 生活化场景：模特真实使用+卖点文案
data.inputMapping: {{agent-plan-model-scene-copy.output.text}}\n\nRoute B: Lifestyle scene image with real model naturally using product. English headline + 2 English badges only. Keep text at top/side safe zones and away from subject and product.
data.instructions: English-only copy. Keep readability high and never overlay text on key subject/product pixels.

data.label: 移动端竖版卖点图
data.description: 竖版素材：模特+主卖点文案
data.inputMapping: {{agent-plan-model-scene-copy.output.text}}\n\nRoute C: Vertical mobile ad creative. Model-focused, product clear. English headline + 2 English badges. Text only at top margin and top corners, with enough spacing.
data.instructions: English-only copy. Mobile-first readability. Avoid covering model face, hands, and product silhouette.

data.label: 方图对比卖点图
data.description: 方图风格：模特+差异化卖点文案
data.inputMapping: {{agent-plan-model-scene-copy.output.text}}\n\nRoute D: Square social/ad creative. Real model + product in frame. English headline + 2 English badges. Keep copy in non-overlapping corner/top zones.
data.instructions: English-only copy. Clear hierarchy and non-overlap with subject/product are mandatory.

data.label: 卖点文案平铺图
data.description: 高端平铺构图：产品主体 + 卖点文案 + 引导线
data.inputMapping: {{agent-plan-model-scene-copy.output.text}}\n\nRoute E: Create a professionally designed Amazon secondary image using a premium flat-lay style. Keep the product exactly recognizable from reference, add elegant English headline + 2 badges + subtle callout lines, and apply optional color-variant styling (e.g., white/champagne/pink accents) without changing product structure.
data.instructions: English-only copy. Keep text away from the product body. Luxury composition, balanced spacing, and production-ready typography hierarchy are mandatory.

data.label: 并行结果汇总
data.description: 汇总5路模特/场景/卖点文案图结果

data.label: 交付审校
data.description: 输出可交付版本与二次优化建议
data.instructions:
Review all branch outputs and report in English only.
Hard rules:
1) Do NOT ask any follow-up questions.
2) Do NOT request extra context or files.
3) If one branch is weak/missing, mark it as FAILED and still finish the full report.
Return final deliverables directly in this exact structure:
- Route scoreboard table (hero / lifestyle / mobile / square / flatlay-copy): quality score 0-100, text overlap risk, pass/fail.
- Winner list by use-case.
- Retry prompts only for failed/non-compliant branches.
- Final launch-ready checklist (max 5 bullets).

data.label: 模特卖点图交付
data.description: 输出多张可用的模特卖点图
